from cadquery import Workplane
import cadquery as cq

# Create the ring band
ring = (
    Workplane("XY")
    .circle(10)  # Outer radius
    .circle(9)   # Inner radius
    .extrude(2)  # Ring height
)

# Create the center stone (oval/cushion cut diamond)
center_stone = (
    Workplane("XY")
    .workplane(offset=2)
    .ellipse(2.5, 2)
    .workplane(offset=3)
    .ellipse(2.3, 1.8)
    .loft()
    .faces(">Z")
    .workplane()
    .ellipse(2.3, 1.8)
    .workplane(offset=-1.5)
    .ellipse(0....
